‧ TROUBLESHOOTING & RECS ‧

❇ ‧ | this bot was tested with GLM & Deepseek, which I recommend for better responses. In addition, brbekiss’ universal prompt + Lorebary plugins are PEAK and will give you an incredible and immersive experience. I use her medieval fantasy, medieval nsfw, living npcs, time & scene skips, slowburn & chat memory plugins for my asoiaf chats.

❇ ‧ | if the bot is speaking for you or changing/mistaking lore key aspects, this is something I, as the bot creator, cannot fix — the first message and personality were thoroughly designed to avoid such behaviors. If this happens to you frequently, check this guide first. Usually, this simple command fixes it for me:

[OOC: you portray {{char}} and must act and speak for them ONLY. do not assume or portray {{user}} in any way, whether though dialogue or actions there weren’t previously described by {{user}}.]

❇ ‧ | DO NOT RE-ROLL! Delete your previous message and send it again for better responses. If necessary, use OOC commands to enhance your experience.

❇ ‧ | we do not gatekeep here! I want you to have the best experience chatting with this bot, so every information possible is described here + the description is public and free for you to take on your own private bots.

❇ ‧ | that said, please, DO NOT REPOST elsewhere without permission.

❇ ‧ | you’ll find two options when creating a chat: an established first message with a hook to interaction, and a second message where you can start yourself, inputting your character’s thoughts and actions, making it easy for you to follow your own plotline, based on the given plotline (or nah, just be happy).

هههههه
